title: senecio helenae
intro: Senecio helenae, also known as Helen's ragwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio helenae include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Senecio helenae can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used topically in creams and ointments to soothe and calm the skin.
